Ardsley.intel: Ardsley is 0-8 in 2026 (0-7 on DS, plus L 3-6 vs DF Apr 14 not yet entered). Outscored heavily across all games. Up next: Apr 18 at Putnam Valley.

Blind Brook.intel: Blind Brook is 5-2 in 2026 and on a 5-game win streak. Wins: 8-7 vs Edgemont, 3-2 vs Valhalla, 8-2 vs Haldane, 12-8 vs Irvington, and 2-1 vs North Salem (Apr 14). Early losses to Pawling (5-15) and Hastings (2-6). Plays Westlake today (Apr 17). Up next: Apr 18 at Briarcliff, Apr 20 at Dobbs Ferry (League).

Edgemont.intel: Edgemont is 1-7 in 2026. Only win was 6-0 vs Haldane (Apr 13). Lost to Blind Brook (7-8), John Jay CR (1-11), DF (1-5), Pearl River (0-10), unknown opponents (6-9 Apr 10, 6-12 Apr 11), and Leffell (1-5 Apr 15). Up next: Apr 18 at North Salem, Apr 20 at Pawling.

Haldane.intel: Haldane is 1-5 in 2026. Only win was 10-0 vs Peekskill (Mar 30). Losses to Rye Neck (1-13), Sleepy Hollow (10-12), Irvington (0-13), Blind Brook (2-8), and Edgemont (0-6). Up next: Apr 18 vs Dobbs Ferry (11:00 AM), then Apr 20 and beyond.

Hastings.intel: Hastings is 3-5 in 2026 with a W2 streak and Conf 2-1. Beat Blind Brook 6-2, Ardsley 4-3 (Apr 13), and won walkoff Apr 15 (vs Albertus Magnus). Losses to Pelham, Westlake, Eastchester, Putnam Valley, Scarsdale. Up next: Apr 18 at Valhalla, Apr 20 vs Tuckahoe (League), Apr 24 at Dobbs Ferry (League).

Irvington.intel: Irvington is 5-2 in 2026 and looking strong with Conf 5-2 and W2 streak. Beat DF 7-1 (Apr 13), Woodlands 10-0 (Apr 14), Sleepy Hollow 9-8, Haldane 13-0, Woodlands 20-6. Losses to DF (2-6 Mar 24) and Blind Brook (8-12). Up next: Apr 18 at Woodlands, Apr 22 at Sleepy Hollow.

Leffell School.intel: Leffell is 2-0 in 2026 with dominant wins: 21-1 vs Alexander Hamilton (Apr 13) and 5-1 vs Edgemont (Apr 15). Has a game today Apr 16 at Putnam Valley, then Apr 20 vs Rye Neck (League). Up next: Apr 16 at Putnam Valley.

Pearl River.intel: Pearl River is 3-1 in 2026. Lost opener 7-8 at Nyack, then beat Ardsley 10-1, Edgemont 10-0, and DF 11-10 (Apr 11). Up next: Apr 25 tournament, Apr 28 vs North Rockland.

Rye Neck.intel: Rye Neck is 3-3 in 2026 on a 3-game losing streak. Strong early wins: 8-2 vs Pawling, 13-1 vs Haldane, 15-5 at Sleepy Hollow. Then collapsed: L 0-6 at Pawling, L 0-8 vs Bronxville, L 3-14 vs Valhalla (Apr 16). Up next: Apr 18 at Pleasantville, Apr 20 at Leffell (League).

Also beat Yonkers Montessori 10-4 and Haldane 12-10. Lost to Irvington (8-9), Briarcliff (0-14), Rye Neck (5-15), and Yonkers Montessori (9-10). Up next: Apr 18 at Woodlands, Apr 20 at Barack Obama School.

Lost to Walter Panas (1-4), Tappan Zee (1-12), Pelham (3-8). Apr 16 at Briarcliff result not entered. Up next: Apr 17 at Blind Brook (TODAY), May 11 vs Dobbs Ferry.
